children.text: the continuation of existing primitive and semiprimitive recreational use in a natural environment;
preservation and protection of forest, aquatic and grassland habitat;

protection and conservation of special areas having uncommon or outstanding wilderness, biological, geological, recreational, cultural, historical or archeological, and scientific, or other values contributing to the public benefit;
the continuation of existing livestock grazing uses;
the control of noxious weeds and insects and prevention of their spreading onto the nearby private and Federal lands; and
the control of fires and prevention of their spreading onto nearby private and Federal lands.

children.heading: Fire control; Memorandum of Agreement
children.label: b Fire control; Memorandum of Agreement
children.text: The Secretary shall enter into a Memorandum of Agreement with local and State firefighting agencies and individuals to assure the best utilization of the firefighting resources available in the nearby communities for control of fire in the national recreation area.

children.heading: Hunting, fishing, and trapping
children.label: c Hunting, fishing, and trapping
children.text: The Secretary shall permit hunting, fishing, and trapping on lands and waters under the Secretary’s jurisdiction within the boundaries of the national recreation area designated by this subchapter in accordance with applicable laws of the United States and the State of Nebraska.

children.heading: Mining and mineral leasing laws
children.label: d Mining and mineral leasing laws
children.text: Subject to valid existing rights, all Federal lands within the national recreation area are hereby withdrawn from location, entry, and patent under the United States mining laws, and from disposition under all laws pertaining to mineral and geothermal leasing and all amendments thereto.

children.heading: State responsibilities with respect to wildlife and fish unaffected
children.label: e State responsibilities with respect to wildlife and fish unaffected
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed as affecting the jurisdiction or responsibilities of the State of Nebraska with respect to wildlife and fish in the national recreation area.

children.heading: Comprehensive management plan
children.label: f Comprehensive management plan
children.text: Within eighteen months after , the Secretary shall develop and submit to the Committee on Interior and Insular Affairs and the Committee on Agriculture of the United States House of Representatives and to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the United States Senate a comprehensive management plan for the national recreation area designated by this subchapter.October 20, 1986

children.heading: Public participation in development of management plan
children.label: g Public participation in development of management plan
children.text: In conducting the reviews and preparing the comprehensive management plan required by subsection (d), the Secretary shall provide for full public participation, and shall consider the views of all interested agencies, organizations, and individuals.1So in original. Probably should be “subsection (f),”.1
